description: Style NoteIf cool is your middle name, this black bag from wac by wrangler belongs in your collection. Perfect for college or just hanging out with friends, carry this along wherever you go and flaunt your trendy style statement! Product DetailsBlack handbag with w branding in frontTwo twill tape short straps with leather overlayOne main zippered compartment with organiser sleeves and one internal zippered pocketHas two pockets on the side with a flap and adjustable loop buckle closure Material and CareCanvasWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust and dirt SizeHeight: 28 cmWidth: 43 cmDepth: 15 cm
